findings.one_line: The endpoint-contact step at M_*(P) is not reproduced from the declared hypotheses: the proof uses the infimum definition of M_*(P) as if zero-entry were closed at the frontier, but nonemptiness and interval membership are only assumed on [0,M_*(P)], not on budgets just above M_*(P).

This node proves an attainment statement for the pre-imposed class H_*(P,M): the compatible values are exactly the interval between the infimum and supremum that define L_*(P,M) and U_*(P,M), so the theorem does not yet deliver a stronger observed-law sharp-identification result than the class already encodes.

The critical-curvature object M_*(P) and the same-law ambiguity clause are routine consequences of the nested M-indexed endpoint family once non-singletonity is allowed, so this proposition reads as a decision-facing reparameterization rather than an independent regime-opening theorem.
